name: Arizona Eagle Mining Corp.
description: Arizona Eagle Mining Corp. is a junior mineral exploration company focused on its 100%-owned Eagle Project, a 4,533-acre property of patented and unpatented claims near Prescott Valley in Yavapai County, Arizona, hosting the past-producing high-grade McCabe gold-silver mine. The company commenced trading on the TSXV in March 2026 and immediately launched a fully-funded Phase 1 drill program of approximately 4,500 metres designed to confirm the historic resource estimate and expand mineralization. Arizona Eagle is at the early exploration stage, with a second drill rig scheduled to mobilize in mid-2026.
